creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
I just manually downloaded w32api-3.13-mingw32-dev.tar.gz from there, and did 
"md5 w32api-3.13-mingw32-dev.tar.gz" and it has the correct checksum.  Can you 
show what it said when you did make checksum?  Also, the files are usually 
stored in /usr/ports/distfiles/mingw, so you could manually run md5 on the
files in there and see if they match what distinfo says.

I also just did a portsnap inside of a VM running FreeBSD 8.0-RC1 from the
same server you did (portsnap2.freebsd.org), deleted anything in 
/usr/ports/distfiles/mingw, and then I did the following from a csh shell: env 
MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE=http://freefr.dl.sourceforge.net/project/%SUBDIR%/ make 
checksum.  Says checksum OK for all 3 files.  I'm really not sure what is going 
on with your end, but I am not seeing any of the problems you are.

Thanks,
Naram Qashat
